YKS Summer School Closing Program Was Held at Our University

26.08.2022

YKS Summer School, attended by 80 senior high school students from Istanbul and various cities of Anatolia, has ended.

At the closing ceremony of the Summer School, where the participating students were hosted at our University for 6 weeks and experienced an intensive YKS preparation process, as well as a qualified university and campus experience with various seminars and social activities, the students received their participation certificates from Prof. Atilla Arkan.

In the YKS Summer School, where intensive training and activities are offered in order to prepare high school seniors for the university entrance exams, expert educators gave trainings for 6 weeks. Various activities such as excursions, picnics and motivational seminars were also held within the scope of the program.
